string.text:
The HK 21 is a 7.62mm general-purpose machine gun based on the HK G3 rifle, in use by the armed forces of various African, Asian, and European states. The HK21E is a revised and modernized model with the intention of improving the reliability, efficiency and service life of the weapon, with the E standing for "export".
 Rare in the Zone, these German-made weapons were left behind by foreign mercs after a failed op near the perimeter. Heavy, reliable, and deadly.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] ACOG, Barska ES AC10632, EOTech scopes
Box containing a belt with capacity for 100 7.62x51 rounds, heavy and voluminous. Probably a replica, as the German original boxes went out of production many years ago.
